query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(t.id, ':', t.name, '=', IFNULL(p.pipelineCount, 0)) SEPARATOR ' | ') as info FROM tenants t LEFT JOIN (SELECT tenantId, COUNT(*) as pipelineCount FROM pipelines GROUP BY tenantId) p ON p.tenantId = t.id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(CONCAT(t.id, ':', t.name, '=', IFNULL(p.pipelineCount, 0)) SEPARATOR ' | ') as info FROM tenants t LEFT JOIN (SELECT tenantId, COUNT(*) as pipelineCount FROM pipelines GROUP BY tenantId) p ON p.tenantId = t.id;
